steps.title: Add the equations directly
steps.content: The question asks for $x+y$, and adding the two equations creates exactly that: $$4x+(-3x+y)=20+(-7).$$

steps.title: Read off the requested value
steps.content: The left side simplifies to $x+y$, and the right side is $13$. Therefore $$x+y=13.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The answer is $13$. The value $-13$ is the negative of the answer, $27$ is too large, and $-27$ is also negative and does not match the sum.
